title: Infested Item Fix
description: Why are you using silverfish blocks?
body:
Information
---
You know you've done it. Anyone who has never accidentally used silverfish stone bricks while building in creative is lying. 

But now you don't have to make that oopsie anymore :D

Versions
---
This should work anywhere 1.14 to current, maybe 1.13 but I haven't tested that yet

I currently have no plans to make this for older versions, but it's not entirely out of the question

Have issues or a suggestion?
---
Report it on the Github issue tracker so I know I need to fix something :D

This tweak not for you?
---
I don't believe you

Check out my other projects, I might have something you didn't know you needed! :D
